ddls:
CREATE TABLE "freelancers" (
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freelancer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the freelancer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., Marketing, UX Design) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary about the freelancer's experience */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the freelancer */,
  "work_rate" TEXT /* Hourly work rate of the freelancer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Total years of experience of the freelancer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language proficiency of the freelancer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the freelancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Angular JS, Ruby on Rails) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of expertise (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., Programming, Design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freelancer_skills" (
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill associated with the freelancer */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of expertise of the freelancer in the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freelancer_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the freelancer is assigned to */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer assigned to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the freelancer in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "hours_allocated" REAL /* Total hours allocated to the freelancer for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer being reviewed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the review */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score given to the freelancer (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the freelancer (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the freelancer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the freelancer */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the freelancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work record */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer who worked */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the hours are logged for */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked by the freelancer on the project */,
  "work_date" TEXT /* Date when the work was completed */,
  "work_description" TEXT /* Description of the work done */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which billing is done */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer being billed */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Total amount due for the work completed */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date when the billing was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the billing (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Project Manager, Developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role in the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., View Projects, Edit Freelancers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES freelancers ("freelancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, ZIP) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
